description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Project that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch. The workflow should have three jobs: build, build_d2d, and build_android. The build job should run on multiple platforms (windows, ubuntu, macos) with different build types (Debug, Release) and configure and build a project using cmake. The build_d2d job should build a project on ubuntu with Direct To Display. The build_android job should build an Android project in a container using a gradlew script.
